58→  matrix[N_new, P] H_new;\n    59→}\n    60→\n    61→parameters {\n    62→  vector[P] beta;\n    63→  real<lower=0> alpha;\n    64→  vector<lower=0>[D] rho;\n    65→  real<lower=0> sigma;\n    66→}\n    67→\n    68→transformed parameters {\n    69→  vector[N] mu = H * beta;\n    70→  matrix[N, N] K = cov_ard_sqexp(X, rho, alpha, jitter)\n    71→                   + diag_matrix(rep_vector(square(sigma), N));\n    72→  matrix[N, N] L_K = cholesky_decompose(K);\n    73→}\n    74→\n    75→model {\n    76→  beta  ~ normal(0, 1);\n    77→  alpha ~ normal(0, 1.5);\n    78→  rho   ~ lognormal(0, 1);\n    79→  sigma ~ normal(0, 0.5);\n    80→  y ~ multi_normal_cholesky(mu, L_K);\n    81→}\n    82→\n    83→generated quantities {\n    84→  vector[N_new] y_new;\n    85→  if (N_new > 0) {\n    86→    matrix[N, N_new] K_x_xnew = cross_cov_ard(X, X_new, rho, alpha);\n    87→    matrix[N_new, N_new] K_new = cov_ard_sqexp(X_new, rho, alpha, jitter);\n    88→    vector[N] resid = y - (H * beta);\n    89→\n    90→    vector[N] alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, resid);\n    91→    alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K', alpha_vec);\n    92→\n    93→    vector[N_new] f_mean = (K_x_xnew' * alpha_vec);\n    94→    matrix[N, N_new] v = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, K_x_xnew);\n    95→    vector[N_new] f_var = to_vector(diagonal(K_new)) - to_vector(columns_dot_self(v));\n    96→    for (m in 1:N_new) {\n    97→      real m_mean = (H_new[m] * beta) + f_mean[m];\n    98→      real m_sd   = sqrt(f_var[m] + square(sigma));\n    99→      y_new[m] = normal_rng(m_mean, as.matrix(test_X)\n   113→train_y <- train_y$y\n   114→\n   115→P <- as.integer(meta_pub$P)\n   116→jitter <- as.numeric(meta_pub$jitter)\n   117→\n   118→N <- nrow(train_X); D <- ncol(train_X)\n   119→N_new <- nrow(test_X)\n   120→\n   121→H <- cbind(1, train_X[,1], train_X[,2])\n   122→H_new <- if (N_new > 0) cbind(1, test_X[,1], test_X[,2]) else matrix(0, 0, P)\n   123→\n   124→data_list <- list(\n   125→  N = N, D = D, X = train_X,\n   126→  P = P, H = H, y = train_y,\n   127→  jitter = jitter,\n   128→  N_new = N_new,\n   129→  X_new = if (N_new > 0) test_X else matrix(0, 0, D),\n   130→  H_new = if (N_new > 0) H_new else matrix(0, 0, P)\n   131→)\n   132→\n   133→sm <- stan_model(\"gp_ard_regression.stan\")\n   134→fit <- sampling(\n   135→  sm, data = data_list,\n   136→  chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000, thin = 2,\n   137→  seed = 1,\n   138→  control = list(\n   139→    adapt_delta = 0.93,\n   140→    max_treedepth = 14,\n   141→    adapt_gamma = 0.05,\n   142→ colMeans(post$rho)\n   157→beta_post <- colMeans(post$beta)\n   158→\n   159→cat(\"Posterior means:\\n\")\n   160→cat(\"alpha:\", alpha_post, \"\\n\")\n   161→cat(\"sigma:\", sigma_post, \"\\n\")\n   162→cat(\"rho:  \", paste(round(rho_post, 6), collapse = \" \"), \"\\n\")\n   163→cat(\"beta: \", paste(round(beta_post, 6), collapse = \" \"), \"\\n\")\n   164→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"977fcd15-36aa-4aa2-8b26-65c5bf12a51a","uuid":"b20bee11-4d25-461a-a837-2a2c1f60777a","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/app/gp_rstan.R","content":"library(readr)\nlibrary(rstan)\nlibrary(posterior)\nlibrary(jsonlite)\n\nstan_code <- \"\nfunctions {\n  matrix cov_ard_sqexp(matrix X, vector rho, real alpha, real jitter) {\n    int N = rows(X);\n    int D = cols(X);\n    matrix[N, N] K;\n\n    for (i in 1:N) {\n      K[i, i] = square(alpha) + jitter;\n      for (j in (i + 1):N) {\n        real s = 0;\n        for (d in 1:D) {\n          real t = (X[i, d] - X[j, d]) / rho[d];\n          s += t * t;\n        }\n        K[i, j] = square(alpha) * exp(-0.5 * s);\n        K[j, i] = K[i, j];\n      }\n    }\n    return K;\n  }\n\n  matrix cross_cov_ard(matrix X, matrix X_new, vector rho, real alpha) {\n    int N = rows(X);\n    int M = rows(X_new);\n    int D = cols(X); // == cols(X_new)\n    matrix[N, M] Kx;\n    for (i in 1:N) {\n      for (j in 1:M) {\n        real s = 0;\n        for (d in 1:D) {\n          real t = (X[i, d] - X_new[j, d]) / rho[d];\n          s += t * t;\n        }\n        Kx[i, j] = square(alpha) * exp(-0.5 * s);\n      }\n    }\n    return Kx;\n  }\n}\n\ndata {\n  int<lower=1> N;\n  int<lower=1> D;\n  matrix[N, D] X;\n  int<lower=1> P;\n  matrix[N, P] H;\n  vector[N] y;\n  real<lower=0> jitter;\n\n  int<lower=0> N_new;\n  matrix[N_new, D] X_new;\n  matrix[N_new, P] H_new;\n}\n\nparameters {\n  vector[P] beta;\n  real<lower=0> alpha;\n  vector<lower=0>[D] rho;\n  real<lower=0> sigma;\n}\n\ntransformed parameters {\n  vector[N] mu = H * beta;\n  matrix[N, N] K = cov_ard_sqexp(X, rho, alpha, jitter)\n                   + diag_matrix(rep_vector(square(sigma), N));\n  matrix[N, N] L_K = cholesky_decompose(K);\n}\n\nmodel {\n  beta  ~ normal(0, 1);\n  alpha ~ normal(0, 1.5);\n  rho   ~ lognormal(0, 1);\n  sigma ~ normal(0, 0.5);\n  y ~ multi_normal_cholesky(mu, L_K);\n}\n\ngenerated quantities {\n  vector[N_new] y_new;\n  if (N_new > 0) {\n    matrix[N, N_new] K_x_xnew = cross_cov_ard(X, X_new, rho, alpha);\n    matrix[N_new, N_new] K_new = cov_ard_sqexp(X_new, rho, alpha, jitter);\n    vector[N] resid = y - (H * beta);\n\n    vector[N] alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, resid);\n    alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K', alpha_vec);\n\n    vector[N_new] f_mean = (K_x_xnew' * alpha_vec);\n    matrix[N, N_new] v = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, K_x_xnew);\n    vector[N_new] f_var = to_vector(diagonal(K_new)) - to_vector(columns_dot_self(v));\n    for (m in 1:N_new) {\n      real m_mean = (H_new[m] * beta) + f_mean[m];\n      real m_sd   = sqrt(f_var[m] + square(sigma));\n      y_new[m] = normal_rng(m_mean, m_sd);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\"\n\nwriteLines(stan_code, \"gp_ard_regression.stan\")\n\nmeta_pub <- jsonlite::fromJSON(\"meta_public.json\")\ntrain_X <- read_csv(\"train_X.csv\")\ntest_X <- read_csv(\"test_X.csv\")\ntrain_y <- read_csv(\"train_y.csv\")\ntrain_X <- as.matrix(train_X)\ntest_X <- as.matrix(test_X)\ntrain_y <- train_y$y\n\nP <- as.integer(meta_pub$P)\njitter <- as.numeric(meta_pub$jitter)\n\nN <- nrow(train_X); D <- ncol(train_X)\nN_new <- nrow(test_X)\n\nH <- cbind(1, train_X[,1], train_X[,2])\nH_new <- if (N_new > 0) cbind(1, test_X[,1], test_X[,2]) else matrix(0, 0, P)\n\ndata_list <- list(\n  N = N, D = D, X = train_X,\n  P = P, H = H, y = train_y,\n  jitter = jitter,\n  N_new = N_new,\n  X_new = if (N_new > 0) test_X else matrix(0, 0, D),\n  H_new = if (N_new > 0) H_new else matrix(0, 0, P)\n)\n\nsm <- stan_model(\"gp_ard_regression.stan\")\nfit <- sampling(\n  sm, data = data_list,\n  chains = 4, iter = 2000, warmup = 1000, thin = 2,\n  seed = 1,\n  control = list(\n    adapt_delta = 0.93,\n    max_treedepth = 14,\n    adapt_gamma = 0.05,\n    adapt_kappa = 0.75,\n    adapt_t0 = 10,\n    adapt_init_buffer = 100,\n    adapt_term_buffer = 50,\n    adapt_window = 25\n  ),\n  init_r = 0.1,\n  save_warmup = FALSE,\n  refresh = 200\n)\n\npost <- rstan::extract(fit)\nalpha_post <- mean(post$alpha)\nsigma_post <- mean(post$sigma)\nrho_post <- colMeans(post$rho)\nbeta_post <- colMeans(post$beta)\n\ncat(\"Posterior means:\\n\")\ncat(\"alpha:\", alpha_post, \"\\n\")\ncat(\"sigma:\", sigma_post, \"\\n\")\ncat(\"rho:  \", paste(round(rho_post, 6), collapse = \" \"), \"\\n\")\ncat(\"beta: \", paste(round(beta_post, 6), collapse = \" \"), \"\\n\")\n","numLines":164,"startLine":1,"totalLines":164}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01F1HZsNGt9TVmtnL4J1R2Do","type":"tool_result","content":"    def sample(self, *, num_chains=4, **kwargs) -> stan.fit.Fit:\n        \"\"\"Draw samples from the model.\n\n        Parameters in ``kwargs`` will be passed to the default sample function.\n        The default sample function is currently\n        ``stan::services::sample::hmc_nuts_diag_e_adapt``.  Parameter names are\n        identical to those used in CmdStan.  See the CmdStan documentation for\n        parameter descriptions and default values.\n\n        There is one exception:  `num_chains`. `num_chains` is a\n        PyStan-specific keyword argument. It indicates the number of\n        independent processes to use when drawing samples.\n\n\n        Returns:\n            Fit: instance of Fit allowing access to draws.\n\n        Examples:\n            User-defined initial values for parameters must be provided\n            for each chain. Typically they will be the same for each chain.\n            The following example shows how user-defined initial parameters\n            are provided:\n\n            >>> program_code = \"parameters {real y;} model {y ~ normal(0,1);}\"\n            >>> posterior = stan.build(program_code)\n            >>> fit = posterior.sample(num_chains=2, init=[{\"y\": 3}, {\"y\": 3}])\n\n        \"\"\"\n        return self.hmc_nuts_diag_e_adapt(num_chains=num_chains, **kwargs)","is_error":false}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"977fcd15-36aa-4aa2-8b26-65c5bf12a51a","uuid":"ef2e904f-087e-4f17-bef3-f0523eb97e96","tool_use_result":{"stdout":"    def sample(self, *, num_chains=4, **kwargs) -> stan.fit.Fit:\n        \"\"\"Draw samples from the model.\n\n        Parameters in ``kwargs`` will be passed to the default sample function.\n        The default sample function is currently\n        ``stan::services::sample::hmc_nuts_diag_e_adapt``. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Q5ZaWQG56oXvySuGvakfkj","type":"tool_result","content":"    def _create_fit(self, *, function, num_chains, **kwargs) -> stan.fit.Fit:\n        \"\"\"Make a request to httpstan's ``create_fit`` endpoint and process results.\n\n        Users should not use this function.\n\n        Parameters in ``kwargs`` will be passed to the (Python wrapper of)\n        `function`. Parameter names are identical to those used in CmdStan.\n        See the CmdStan documentation for parameter descriptions and default\n        values.\n\n        Returns:\n            Fit: instance of Fit allowing access to draws.\n\n        \"\"\"\n        assert \"chain\" not in kwargs, \"`chain` id is set automatically.\"\n        assert \"data\" not in kwargs, \"`data` is set in `build`.\"\n        assert \"random_seed\" not in kwargs, \"`random_seed` is set in `build`.\"\n\n        # copy kwargs and verify everything is JSON-encodable\n        kwargs = json.loads(DataJSONEncoder().encode(kwargs))\n\n        # FIXME: special handling here for `init`, consistent with PyStan 2 but needs docs\n        init: List[Data] = kwargs.pop(\"init\", [dict() for _ in range(num_chains)])\n        if len(init) != num_chains:\n            raise ValueError(\"Initial values must be provided for each chain.\")\n\n        payloads = []\n        for chain in range(1, num_chains + 1):\n            payload = kwargs.copy()\n            payload[\"function\"] = function\n            payload[\"chain\"] = chain  # type: ignore\n            payload[\"data\"] = self.data  # type: ignore\n            payload[\"init\"] = init.pop(0)\n            if self.random_seed is not None:\n                payload[\"random_seed\"] = self.random_seed  # poll to get progress for each chain until all chains finished\n                current_iterations = {}\n                while not all(operation[\"done\"] for operation in operations):\n                    for operation in operations:\n                        if operation[\"done\"]:\n                            continue\n                        resp = await client.get(f\"/{operation['name']}\")\n                        assert resp.status != 404\n                        operation.update(resp.json())\n                        progress_message = operation[\"metadata\"].get(\"progress\")\n                        if not progress_message:\n                            continue\n                        iteration, iteration_max = map(\n                            int, current_and_max_iterations_re.findall(progress_message).pop(0)\n                        )\n                        if current_iterations.get(operation[\"name\"]) == iteration:\n                            continue\n                        current_iterations[operation[\"name\"]] = iteration\n                        iterations_count = sum(current_iterations.values())\n                        total_iterations = iteration_max * num_chains\n                        percent_complete = 100 * iterations_count / total_iterations\n                        sampling_output.clear() if io.supports_ansi() else sampling_output.write(\"\\n\")\n                        sampling_output.write_line(\n                            f\"<comment>Sampling:</comment> {round(percent_complete):3.0f}% ({iterations_count}/{total_iterations})\"\n                        )\n                    await asyncio.sleep(0.05)\n\n                fit_in_cache = len(current_iterations) < num_chains\n\n                stan_outputs = []\n                for operation in operations:\n                    fit_name = operation[\"result\"].get(\"name\")\n                    if fit_name is None:  # {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_019wDmHgZEZNqKH9oNgz3KNL","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01J62xfTuWzgdUNCi8THD1u3","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/pystan_analysis.py","content":"import stan\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nimport json\n\n# Stan model code (functionally equivalent to gp_rstan.R)\nstan_code = \"\"\"\nfunctions {\n  matrix cov_ard_sqexp(matrix X, vector rho, real alpha, real jitter) {\n    int N = rows(X);\n    int D = cols(X);\n    matrix[N, N] K;\n\n    for (i in 1:N) {\n      K[i, i] = square(alpha) + jitter;\n      for (j in (i + 1):N) {\n        real s = 0;\n        for (d in 1:D) {\n          real t = (X[i, d] - X[j, d]) / rho[d];\n          s += t * t;\n        }\n        K[i, j] = square(alpha) * exp(-0.5 * s);\n        K[j, i] = K[i, j];\n      }\n    }\n    return K;\n  }\n\n  matrix cross_cov_ard(matrix X, matrix X_new, vector rho, real alpha) {\n    int N = rows(X);\n    int M = rows(X_new);\n    int D = cols(X);\n    matrix[N, M] Kx;\n    for (i in 1:N) {\n      for (j in 1:M) {\n        real s = 0;\n        for (d in 1:D) {\n          real t = (X[i, d] - X_new[j, d]) / rho[d];\n          s += t * t;\n        }\n        Kx[i, j] = square(alpha) * exp(-0.5 * s);\n      }\n    }\n    return Kx;\n  }\n}\n\ndata {\n  int<lower=1> N;\n  int<lower=1> D;\n  matrix[N, D] X;\n  int<lower=1> P;\n  matrix[N, P] H;\n  vector[N] y;\n  real<lower=0> jitter;\n\n  int<lower=0> N_new;\n  matrix[N_new, D] X_new;\n  matrix[N_new, P] H_new;\n}\n\nparameters {\n  vector[P] beta;\n  real<lower=0> alpha;\n  vector<lower=0>[D] rho;\n  real<lower=0> sigma;\n}\n\ntransformed parameters {\n  vector[N] mu = H * beta;\n  matrix[N, N] K = cov_ard_sqexp(X, rho, alpha, jitter)\n                   + diag_matrix(rep_vector(square(sigma), N));\n  matrix[N, N] L_K = cholesky_decompose(K);\n}\n\nmodel {\n  beta  ~ normal(0, 1);\n  alpha ~ normal(0, 1.5);\n  rho   ~ lognormal(0, 1);\n  sigma ~ normal(0, 0.5);\n  y ~ multi_normal_cholesky(mu, L_K);\n}\n\ngenerated quantities {\n  vector[N_new] y_new;\n  if (N_new > 0) {\n    matrix[N, N_new] K_x_xnew = cross_cov_ard(X, X_new, rho, alpha);\n    matrix[N_new, N_new] K_new = cov_ard_sqexp(X_new, rho, alpha, jitter);\n    vector[N] resid = y - (H * beta);\n\n    vector[N] alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, resid);\n    alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K', alpha_vec);\n\n    vector[N_new] f_mean = (K_x_xnew' * alpha_vec);\n    matrix[N, N_new] v = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, K_x_xnew);\n    vector[N_new] f_var = to_vector(diagonal(K_new)) - to_vector(columns_dot_self(v));\n    for (m in 1:N_new) {\n      real m_mean = (H_new[m] * beta) + f_mean[m];\n      real m_sd   = sqrt(f_var[m] + square(sigma));\n      y_new[m] = normal_rng(m_mean, m_sd);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\"\"\"\n\n# Load data\nwith open('/app/meta_public.json', 'r') as f:\n    meta_pub = json.load(f)\n\ntrain_X = pd.read_csv('/app/train_X.csv').values\ntest_X = pd.read_csv('/app/test_X.csv').values\ntrain_y = pd.read_csv('/app/train_y.csv')['y'].values\n\nP = int(meta_pub['P'])\njitter = float(meta_pub['jitter'])\n\nN, D = train_X.shape\nN_new = test_X.shape[0]\n\n# Design matrix H: intercept + first 2 columns of X (matching R: cbind(1, train_X[,1], train_X[,2]))\nH = np.column_stack([np.ones(N), train_X[:, 0], train_X[:, 1]])\nH_new = np.column_stack([np.ones(N_new), test_X[:, 0], test_X[:, 1]]) if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, P))\n\n# Prepare data dict for Stan\ndata_dict = {\n    'N': N,\n    'D': D,\n    'X': train_X.tolist(),\n    'P': P,\n    'H': H.tolist(),\n    'y': train_y.tolist(),\n    'jitter': jitter,\n    'N_new': N_new,\n    'X_new': test_X.tolist() if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, D)).tolist(),\n    'H_new': H_new.tolist() if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, P)).tolist(),\n}\n\n# Build Stan model (random_seed=1 as required)\nprint(\"Building Stan model...\")\nmodel = stan.build(program_code=stan_code, data=data_dict, random_seed=1)\n\n# Sample with parameters matching R script:\n# R: chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000, thin=2, seed=1\n# R: control=list(adapt_delta=0.93, max_treedepth=14, adapt_gamma=0.05,\n#                 adapt_kappa=0.75, adapt_t0=10, adapt_init_buffer=100,\n#                 adapt_term_buffer=50, adapt_window=25)\n# R: init_r=0.1, save_warmup=FALSE\n#\n# In PyStan 3: num_samples=1000 (post-warmup), num_warmup=1000, num_thin=2\n# random_seed is already set via stan.build(random_seed=1)\nprint(\"Sampling...\")\nfit = model.sample(\n    num_chains=4,\n    num_samples=1000,\n    num_warmup=1000,\n    num_thin=2,\n    save_warmup=False,\n    init_radius=0.1,\n    delta=0.93,\n    max_depth=14,\n    gamma=0.05,\n    kappa=0.75,\n    t0=10,\n    init_buffer=100,\n    term_buffer=50,\n    window=25,\n)\n\n# Extract posterior samples and compute means\n# fit['param'] returns shape (stan_dims, num_chains * num_samples_saved)\n# For scalar params: shape (1, total_samples)\n# For vector params: shape (dim, total_samples)\nalpha_post = np.mean(fit['alpha'])\nsigma_post = np.mean(fit['sigma'])\nrho_post = np.mean(fit['rho'], axis=1)    # shape (D,) = (3,)\nbeta_post = np.mean(fit['beta'], axis=1)  # shape (P,) = (3,)\n\nprint(\"Posterior means:\")\nprint(f\"alpha: {alpha_post}\")\nprint(f\"sigma: {sigma_post}\")\nprint(f\"rho:   {rho_post}\")\nprint(f\"beta:  {beta_post}\")\n\n# Save results to CSV files (numeric values only)\nnp.savetxt('/app/alpha_est.csv', [alpha_post])\nnp.savetxt('/app/sigma_est.csv', [sigma_post])\nnp.savetxt('/app/rho_est.csv', rho_post)\nnp.savetxt('/app/beta_est.csv', beta_post)\n\nprint(\"Results saved to /app/*_est.csv\")\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4265,"cache_read_input_tokens":36135,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":4265,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":8,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"977fcd15-36aa-4aa2-8b26-65c5bf12a51a","uuid":"f55326cf-85a3-4e87-a09a-bc20b49acfc5"}

as pd\n     4→import json\n     5→\n     6→# Stan model code (functionally equivalent to gp_rstan.R)\n     7→stan_code = \"\"\"\n     8→functions {\n     9→  matrix cov_ard_sqexp(matrix X, vector rho, real alpha, real jitter) {\n    10→    int N = rows(X);\n    11→    int D = cols(X);\n    12→    matrix[N, N] K;\n    13→\n    14→    for (i in 1:N) {\n    15→      K[i, i] = square(alpha) + jitter;\n    16→      for (j in (i + 1):N) {\n    17→        real s = 0;\n    18→        for (d in 1:D) {\n    19→          real t = (X[i, d] - X[j, d]) / rho[d];\n    20→          s += t * t;\n    21→ 191→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"977fcd15-36aa-4aa2-8b26-65c5bf12a51a","uuid":"efea324e-e1da-4605-9837-3acc58504771","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/app/pystan_analysis.py","content":"import stan\nimport numpy as np\nimport pandas as pd\nimport json\n\n# Stan model code (functionally equivalent to gp_rstan.R)\nstan_code = \"\"\"\nfunctions {\n  matrix cov_ard_sqexp(matrix X, vector rho, real alpha, real jitter) {\n    int N = rows(X);\n    int D = cols(X);\n    matrix[N, N] K;\n\n    for (i in 1:N) {\n      K[i, i] = square(alpha) + jitter;\n      for (j in (i + 1):N) {\n        real s = 0;\n        for (d in 1:D) {\n          real t = (X[i, d] - X[j, d]) / rho[d];\n          s += t * t;\n        }\n        K[i, j] = square(alpha) * exp(-0.5 * s);\n        K[j, i] = K[i, j];\n      }\n    }\n    return K;\n  }\n\n  matrix cross_cov_ard(matrix X, matrix X_new, vector rho, real alpha) {\n    int N = rows(X);\n    int M = rows(X_new);\n    int D = cols(X);\n    matrix[N, M] Kx;\n    for (i in 1:N) {\n      for (j in 1:M) {\n        real s = 0;\n        for (d in 1:D) {\n          real t = (X[i, d] - X_new[j, d]) / rho[d];\n          s += t * t;\n        }\n        Kx[i, j] = square(alpha) * exp(-0.5 * s);\n      }\n    }\n    return Kx;\n  }\n}\n\ndata {\n  int<lower=1> N;\n  int<lower=1> D;\n  matrix[N, D] X;\n  int<lower=1> P;\n  matrix[N, P] H;\n  vector[N] y;\n  real<lower=0> jitter;\n\n  int<lower=0> N_new;\n  matrix[N_new, D] X_new;\n  matrix[N_new, P] H_new;\n}\n\nparameters {\n  vector[P] beta;\n  real<lower=0> alpha;\n  vector<lower=0>[D] rho;\n  real<lower=0> sigma;\n}\n\ntransformed parameters {\n  vector[N] mu = H * beta;\n  matrix[N, N] K = cov_ard_sqexp(X, rho, alpha, jitter)\n                   + diag_matrix(rep_vector(square(sigma), N));\n  matrix[N, N] L_K = cholesky_decompose(K);\n}\n\nmodel {\n  beta  ~ normal(0, 1);\n  alpha ~ normal(0, 1.5);\n  rho   ~ lognormal(0, 1);\n  sigma ~ normal(0, 0.5);\n  y ~ multi_normal_cholesky(mu, L_K);\n}\n\ngenerated quantities {\n  vector[N_new] y_new;\n  if (N_new > 0) {\n    matrix[N, N_new] K_x_xnew = cross_cov_ard(X, X_new, rho, alpha);\n    matrix[N_new, N_new] K_new = cov_ard_sqexp(X_new, rho, alpha, jitter);\n    vector[N] resid = y - (H * beta);\n\n    vector[N] alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, resid);\n    alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K', alpha_vec);\n\n    vector[N_new] f_mean = (K_x_xnew' * alpha_vec);\n    matrix[N, N_new] v = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, K_x_xnew);\n    vector[N_new] f_var = to_vector(diagonal(K_new)) - to_vector(columns_dot_self(v));\n    for (m in 1:N_new) {\n      real m_mean = (H_new[m] * beta) + f_mean[m];\n      real m_sd   = sqrt(f_var[m] + square(sigma));\n      y_new[m] = normal_rng(m_mean, m_sd);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\"\"\"\n\n# Load data\nwith open('/app/meta_public.json', 'r') as f:\n    meta_pub = json.load(f)\n\ntrain_X = pd.read_csv('/app/train_X.csv').values\ntest_X = pd.read_csv('/app/test_X.csv').values\ntrain_y = pd.read_csv('/app/train_y.csv')['y'].values\n\nP = int(meta_pub['P'])\njitter = float(meta_pub['jitter'])\n\nN, D = train_X.shape\nN_new = test_X.shape[0]\n\n# Design matrix H: intercept + first 2 columns of X (matching R: cbind(1, train_X[,1], train_X[,2]))\nH = np.column_stack([np.ones(N), train_X[:, 0], train_X[:, 1]])\nH_new = np.column_stack([np.ones(N_new), test_X[:, 0], test_X[:, 1]]) if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, P))\n\n# Prepare data dict for Stan\ndata_dict = {\n    'N': N,\n    'D': D,\n    'X': train_X.tolist(),\n    'P': P,\n    'H': H.tolist(),\n    'y': train_y.tolist(),\n    'jitter': jitter,\n    'N_new': N_new,\n    'X_new': test_X.tolist() if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, D)).tolist(),\n    'H_new': H_new.tolist() if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, P)).tolist(),\n}\n\n# Build Stan model (random_seed=1 as required)\nprint(\"Building Stan model...\")\nmodel = stan.build(program_code=stan_code, data=data_dict, random_seed=1)\n\n# Sample with parameters matching R script:\n# R: chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000, thin=2, seed=1\n# R: control=list(adapt_delta=0.93, max_treedepth=14, adapt_gamma=0.05,\n#                 adapt_kappa=0.75, adapt_t0=10, adapt_init_buffer=100,\n#                 adapt_term_buffer=50, adapt_window=25)\n# R: init_r=0.1, save_warmup=FALSE\n#\n# In PyStan 3: num_samples=1000 (post-warmup), num_warmup=1000, num_thin=2\n# random_seed is already set via stan.build(random_seed=1)\nprint(\"Sampling...\")\nfit = model.sample(\n    num_chains=4,\n    num_samples=1000,\n    num_warmup=1000,\n    num_thin=2,\n    save_warmup=False,\n    init_radius=0.1,\n    delta=0.93,\n    max_depth=14,\n    gamma=0.05,\n    kappa=0.75,\n    t0=10,\n    init_buffer=100,\n    term_buffer=50,\n    window=25,\n)\n\n# Extract posterior samples and compute means\n# fit['param'] returns shape (stan_dims, num_chains * num_samples_saved)\n# For scalar params: shape (1, total_samples)\n# For vector params: shape (dim, total_samples)\nalpha_post = np.mean(fit['alpha'])\nsigma_post = np.mean(fit['sigma'])\nrho_post = np.mean(fit['rho'], axis=1)    # shape (D,) = (3,)\nbeta_post = np.mean(fit['beta'], axis=1)  # shape (P,) = (3,)\n\nprint(\"Posterior means:\")\nprint(f\"alpha: {alpha_post}\")\nprint(f\"sigma: {sigma_post}\")\nprint(f\"rho:   {rho_post}\")\nprint(f\"beta:  {beta_post}\")\n\n# Save results to CSV files (numeric values only)\nnp.savetxt('/app/alpha_est.csv', [alpha_post])\nnp.savetxt('/app/sigma_est.csv', [sigma_post])\nnp.savetxt('/app/rho_est.csv', rho_post)\nnp.savetxt('/app/beta_est.csv', beta_post)\n\nprint(\"Results saved to /app/*_est.csv\")\n","numLines":191,"startLine":1,"totalLines":191}}}

 matrix cov_ard_sqexp(matrix X, vector rho, real alpha, real jitter) {\n    int N = rows(X);\n    int D = cols(X);\n    matrix[N, N] K;\n\n    for (i in 1:N) {\n      K[i, i] = square(alpha) + jitter;\n      for (j in (i + 1):N) {\n        real s = 0;\n        for (d in 1:D) {\n          real t = (X[i, d] - X[j, d]) / rho[d];\n          s += t * t;\n        }\n        K[i, j] = square(alpha) * exp(-0.5 * s);\n        K[j, i] = K[i, j];\n      }\n    }\n    return K;\n  }\n\n  matrix cross_cov_ard(matrix X, matrix X_new, vector rho, real alpha) {\n    int N = rows(X);\n    int M = rows(X_new);\n    int D = cols(X);\n    matrix[N, M] Kx;\n    for (i in 1:N) {\n      for (j in 1:M) {\n        real s = 0;\n        for (d in 1:D) {\n          real t = (X[i, d] - X_new[j, d]) / rho[d];\n          s += t * t;\n        }\n        Kx[i, j] = square(alpha) * exp(-0.5 * s);\n      }\n    }\n    return Kx;\n  }\n}\n\ndata {\n  int<lower=1> N;\n  int<lower=1> D;\n  matrix[N, D] X;\n  int<lower=1> P;\n  matrix[N, P] H;\n  vector[N] y;\n  real<lower=0> jitter;\n\n  int<lower=0> N_new;\n  matrix[N_new, D] X_new;\n  matrix[N_new, P] H_new;\n}\n\nparameters {\n  vector[P] beta;\n  real<lower=0> alpha;\n  vector<lower=0>[D] rho;\n  real<lower=0> sigma;\n}\n\ntransformed parameters {\n  vector[N] mu = H * beta;\n  matrix[N, N] K = cov_ard_sqexp(X, rho, alpha, jitter)\n                   + diag_matrix(rep_vector(square(sigma), N));\n  matrix[N, N] L_K = cholesky_decompose(K);\n}\n\nmodel {\n  beta  ~ normal(0, 1);\n  alpha ~ normal(0, 1.5);\n  rho   ~ lognormal(0, 1);\n  sigma ~ normal(0, 0.5);\n  y ~ multi_normal_cholesky(mu, L_K);\n}\n\ngenerated quantities {\n  vector[N_new] y_new;\n  if (N_new > 0) {\n    matrix[N, N_new] K_x_xnew = cross_cov_ard(X, X_new, rho, alpha);\n    matrix[N_new, N_new] K_new = cov_ard_sqexp(X_new, rho, alpha, jitter);\n    vector[N] resid = y - (H * beta);\n\n    vector[N] alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, resid);\n    alpha_vec = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K', alpha_vec);\n\n    vector[N_new] f_mean = (K_x_xnew' * alpha_vec);\n    matrix[N, N_new] v = mdivide_left_tri_low(L_K, K_x_xnew);\n    vector[N_new] f_var = to_vector(diagonal(K_new)) - to_vector(columns_dot_self(v));\n    for (m in 1:N_new) {\n      real m_mean = (H_new[m] * beta) + f_mean[m];\n      real m_sd   = sqrt(f_var[m] + square(sigma));\n      y_new[m] = normal_rng(m_mean, m_sd);\n    }\n  }\n}\n\"\"\"\n\n# Load data\nwith open('/app/meta_public.json', 'r') as f:\n    meta_pub = json.load(f)\n\ntrain_X = pd.read_csv('/app/train_X.csv').values\ntest_X = pd.read_csv('/app/test_X.csv').values\ntrain_y = pd.read_csv('/app/train_y.csv')['y'].values\n\nP = int(meta_pub['P'])\njitter = float(meta_pub['jitter'])\n\nN, D = train_X.shape\nN_new = test_X.shape[0]\n\n# Design matrix H: intercept + first 2 columns of X (matching R: cbind(1, train_X[,1], train_X[,2]))\nH = np.column_stack([np.ones(N), train_X[:, 0], train_X[:, 1]])\nH_new = np.column_stack([np.ones(N_new), test_X[:, 0], test_X[:, 1]]) if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, P))\n\n# Prepare data dict for Stan\ndata_dict = {\n    'N': N,\n    'D': D,\n    'X': train_X.tolist(),\n    'P': P,\n    'H': H.tolist(),\n    'y': train_y.tolist(),\n    'jitter': jitter,\n    'N_new': N_new,\n    'X_new': test_X.tolist() if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, D)).tolist(),\n    'H_new': H_new.tolist() if N_new > 0 else np.zeros((0, P)).tolist(),\n}\n\n# Build Stan model (random_seed=1 as required)\nprint(\"Building Stan model...\")\nmodel = stan.build(program_code=stan_code, data=data_dict, random_seed=1)\n\n# Sample with parameters matching R script:\n# R: chains=4, iter=2000, warmup=1000, thin=2, seed=1\n# R: control=list(adapt_delta=0.93, max_treedepth=14, adapt_gamma=0.05,\n#                 adapt_kappa=0.75, adapt_t0=10, adapt_init_buffer=100,\n#                 adapt_term_buffer=50, adapt_window=25)\n# R: init_r=0.1, save_warmup=FALSE\n#\n# In PyStan 3: num_samples=1000 (post-warmup), num_warmup=1000, num_thin=2\n# random_seed is already set via stan.build(random_seed=1)\nprint(\"Sampling...\")\nfit = model.sample(\n    num_chains=4,\n    num_samples=1000,\n    num_warmup=1000,\n    num_thin=2,\n    save_warmup=False,\n    init_radius=0.1,\n    delta=0.93,\n    max_depth=14,\n    gamma=0.05,\n    kappa=0.75,\n    t0=10,\n    init_buffer=100,\n    term_buffer=50,\n    window=25,\n)\n\n# Extract posterior samples and compute means\n# fit['param'] returns shape (stan_dims, num_chains * num_samples_saved)\n# For scalar params: shape (1, total_samples)\n# For vector params: shape (dim, total_samples)\nalpha_post = np.mean(fit['alpha'])\nsigma_post = np.mean(fit['sigma'])\nrho_post = np.mean(fit['rho'], axis=1)    # shape (D,) = (3,)\nbeta_post = np.mean(fit['beta'], axis=1)  # shape (P,) = (3,)\n\nprint(\"Posterior means:\")\nprint(f\"alpha: {alpha_post}\")\nprint(f\"sigma: {sigma_post}\")\nprint(f\"rho:   {rho_post}\")\nprint(f\"beta:  {beta_post}\")\n\n# Save results to CSV files (numeric values only)\nnp.savetxt('/app/alpha_est.csv', [alpha_post])\nnp.savetxt('/app/sigma_est.csv', [sigma_post])\nnp.savetxt('/app/rho_est.csv', rho_post)\nnp.savetxt('/app/beta_est.csv', beta_post)\n\nprint(\"Results saved to /app/*_est.csv\")\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":66,"oldLines":14,"newStart":66,"newLines":14,"lines":["   real<lower=0> sigma;"," }"," ","-transformed
